## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance continues to improve, with clicks and impressions increasing across articles](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [The team will avoid creating comparison articles listing multiple tools due to brand positioning concerns](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [E-book feedback was positive; discussions ongoing about formatting and branding (e-book vs. whitepaper)](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Matt is developing a comprehensive dashboard to track content performance across various channels](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Six articles delivered for review last week; some published yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Clicks and impressions increased; data engineering skills article remains a top performer](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Older refreshed articles (ETL, ELT) and data pipelines content gaining momentum](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [GA4 shows second-highest number of views and sessions](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Returned direct visitors saw a notable increase](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Articles taking longer to gain traction, possibly due to competition from established brands](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Analytics Discrepancies

  - [Differences exist between Google Search Console (GSC) and Google Analytics 4 (GA4) data](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [GSC focuses on search performance, while GA4 tracks on-site behavior](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Sampling issues and legacy features in GSC contribute to discrepancies](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Team mitigates by analyzing both sources for consistent trends](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Decision to avoid creating comparison articles listing multiple tools](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Concerns about brand positioning and inadvertently promoting smaller competitors](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining Prophecy's current content approach](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### E-book Feedback and Formatting

  - [Overall positive reception to the e-book content](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Discussions about differentiating between e-book and whitepaper formats](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Current e-book length (24 pages) due to covering five distinct topics](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Exploring design options to make content more visually appealing and concise](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Team to review sample formats for inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Performance Tracking Initiative

  - [Matt developing a comprehensive dashboard to track content performance](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Aims to integrate data from various sources (GSC, GA4, ads, Blackbird, LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Focus on establishing consistent metrics and understanding user journey](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Acknowledging challenges in directly linking data between different platforms](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to send sample e-book/whitepaper format for team review](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Team to continue refining e-book design and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Matt to further develop and share the comprehensive performance tracking dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Continue monitoring content performance and adjusting strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/axfmrftzyBVdv3TgJ5zxcPazWNt_vWRM?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
